title: Import / Export Envelope
description: Portable serialization format for the canonical store (FR-016 / SC-009). JSON is the canonical wire format; YAML uses the same logical shape via YamlDotNet.

schemaVersion.description: Date-versioned envelope schema for forward compatibility.

exportedBy.description: Audit principal that produced the export.

changeEvents.description: Optional — exports may include the change-event log for full history transfer.

conflictResolution.description: Default policy hint for the import side; the import operation may still override. Default is reject (safest).
